category_title: Students with mild intellectual disability and leadership potential
minimal_context: Ben is using Google Drive to make a mind map defining emotion for his Liberal Studies class.
dialogue:
TUTOR: Please open Google Drive and make a mind map to work out what is the definition of emotion today.

STUDENT: I put 'HAPPY' first on the mind map.

TUTOR: Okay, keep adding to it.

STUDENT: Typing... I need to work hard.

TUTOR: Any difficulties that you might encounter?

STUDENT: I need to rest. I am feeling nervous.

options.A: Uses the mind map as a tool for the student to develop his creative ideas.
options.B: Pats Ben on the shoulder, smiles, and asks him to create another mind map.
options.C: Deliberately ignores the negative behavior, including verbal expressions of needing to rest or feeling nervous.
options.D: Shifts focus to a progressive and methodical tuning of awareness to each body part (body scan).
